title: 3D Earth Moon
description: This resourcepack changes Moon to 3D model of Earth
body:
Changes the Moon into an animated 3D model of Earth.
![Earth in the sky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bee50e920b8a3f0dcb3c62bb05d001bafaf8153.jpeg)
Also uses the map by NASA/Goddard Space Flight Center Scientific Visualization Studio.
